commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=87fd1d16fe44ebef47e1e399a9dc33371c62e3c7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR filters unreadable or non-serializable agent runtime tool schemas before provider/RuntimePlan normalization, logs quarantine diagnostics in embedded attempt and compaction paths, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +178, Tests +187. Total +365 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main passes tools directly into RuntimePlan/provider normalization, and this PR adds tests with throwing tool entries and parameters getters to prove that crash shape without running the tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide whether to require sibling diagnostics in this branch or accept a tracked split with the doctor follow-up and separate inventory/Codex wiring.

target.title: fix(agents): harden runtime tool schema quarantine
target.body:
## Summary

- quarantines malformed runtime tool schemas before model runtime projection so one bad tool does not abort the whole assistant turn
- adds a pre-normalization quarantine pass for unreadable or non-serializable tool entries before RuntimePlan/provider schema normalization can touch throwing getters
- threads runtime quarantine diagnostics through embedded attempt and compaction paths, and avoids re-reading quarantined tool entries while logging

Doctor reporting is intentionally split out of this PR. This branch is runtime-only after pruning the earlier broader draft.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/runtime-plan/tools.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/runtime-plan/tools.ts src/agents/runtime-plan/tools.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/runtime-plan/tools.ts src/agents/runtime-plan/tools.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `git diff origin/main...HEAD | rg -i '^\\+.*(dofbot|doftbot)' || true`
- AWS Crabbox fresh PR checkout: run `run_6a14fddf7e8f`, lease `cbx_e0f44da2eeda`, slug `crimson-barnacle`, provider `aws`, type `c7a.8xlarge`; command installed Node 22.19.0 + pnpm 11.2.2, then ran `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm check:changed`; passed
- autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings, overall `patch is correct (0.83)`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: unsupported, unreadable, or non-serializable active runtime tool schemas are quarantined before runtime/provider normalization can crash an assistant or compaction turn.

Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux fresh PR checkout for openclaw/openclaw#88735 on `c7a.8xlarge`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: installed Node 22.19.0 and pnpm 11.2.2 on the fresh PR checkout, ran `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`, then ran `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm check:changed`.

Evidence after fix: `run_6a14fddf7e8f` completed with exit code 0; changed gate covered core production files, core tests, typecheck, lint, import-cycle guard, and related guards.

Observed result after fix: changed-gate validation passed, and focused runtime tests prove malformed tools are dropped while healthy tools continue through model session creation.

What was not tested: full repo test suite and doctor reporting. Doctor reporting is deferred to a follow-up PR instead of being bundled into this runtime crash hardening change.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
